title: Digger Helmet
description:
Mod adds a helmet, with support for dynamic lighting.
Requires installing Geckolib
body:
**Made for the [TerraFirmaGreg](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg) modpack**

**Hey diggers!** Tired of digging in the dark, with torches constantly going out? Need to hold something other than a torch in your left hand? **The Digger's Helmet** is your solution!

**Here's how to get it:**

  _Find a zombie that spawns with an Eternal Candle in its hand (20% chance)._

  _Defeat it, claim the Eternal Candle, and craft the Digger's Helmet._

**Features:**

   _Dynamic lighting when worn (enables dynamic entity lighting on Sodium)._

   _Custom animated model — watch the candle glow!_ 🔥

**Bonus modules included:**

   _Auto-Hydrator Module — No more manual drinking! Automatically detects water bottles, buckets, or any liquid containers in your inventory and hydrates you when installed in the helmet._

   _Mining Speed Module — Boosts mining speed for pickaxes and shovels when equipped in the Digger's Helmet._

**Now dig smarter, not harder!** 💡⛏️



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Первый релиз мода.
- Сделан для модпака [TerraFirmaGreg](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg)
- Добавляет шлем с поддержкой динамического освещения от других модов. 
- Для работы требуется установить [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)


Особая благодарнось Dr0n1k, в помощи создания этого мода. Спасибо.
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

- First release of the mod.
- Made for the [TerraFirmaGreg](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg) modpack
- Adds a helmet with dynamic lighting support from other mods.
- Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to work

Special thanks to Dr0n1k for helping create this mod. Thank you.

</details>
